---
title: "GPT Q2"
subtitle: "LX / Tech: Sprache und Technologie - Language and Technology"
#date: '`r format(Sys.time())`'
date: '2026-05-27'
# toc: true
# toc-depth: 3
# toc-expand: true

categories:
   - gpt
   - llms
   - training prospectives
   - LX theories
metadata-files:
  - _quarto-common-lxtech.yml
---

::: {.content-visible when-format="html"}
{{< meta cmeta >}}
:::

{{< include _gitcom.qmd >}} 
::: {.content-visible when-format="html"}

-----

> [LXTech](lxtech001.qmd) / random chat 002

-----
:::
```{r,echo=F,eval=T}
print("engine on...")
```

#### snc
- 16225.1

# random chat...
Q: @claude_strange_2026

{{< include _gpt-16225.md >}} 

# references
